title: Gluten-free Indian Pistachio Stir-fry
description: A savory and light gluten-free Indian dish featuring pistachio paste, perfect for a solo dinner.

ingredients.name: Chicken Breast or Tempeh (substitute for gluten-free options)
Rice Noodles or Gluten-free Bread Crumbs

instructions: Heat a pan with the oil over medium-high heat.
Add garlic powder to the pan and sauté for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in the pistachio paste and stir continuously for about 2 minutes, allowing it to slightly brown.
Season with salt and garam masala. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
If using chicken or tempeh, season them lightly with salt and coat with rice noodles or gluten-free bread crumbs if desired.
Add the prepared meat to the pan and cook for about 5 minutes on each side or until browned and cooked through.
Add chopped fresh spinach during the last minute of cooking. Cook until wilted and heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves if available.
